CustomField.description: Adjacent statutes implicated by this project (e.g., ESA; CWA; NHPA; APA). Multiple values separated by semicolons. Each statute adds compound claim risk per PermitTEC analysis.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Adjacent statutes (ESA; CWA; NHPA; APA). Each one increases litigation compound claim risk.
CustomField.label: Adjacent Statutes
